emails.subject: RE: Help!
emails.body: RE: Help! Karen, Sorry but lunch will be impossible. That week is bid week; also I will be covering for someone else who somehow got approved for vacation during this busy time. Jason Wolfe To: Ames, Chuck; Bajwa, Bilal; Ballato, Russell; Gim, Steve; Heu, Mog; Padron, Juan; Pimenov, Vladi; Plachy, Denver; Schiavone, Paul; Shim, Elizabeth; Smith, Matt; Wagner, Joseph; Wolfe, Jason; Yawapongsiri, Virawan
